name: Melatonin

dosing: 18 mg (during cycle, lowered to 3 mg out of cycle)
preparations: Standard oral tablet/capsule taken at bedtime
Part of D3 Anti-Inflammatory Regimen (Batch protocol) as cofactor
Part of Antihistamine Full Monty supplement stack
Gradual weaning protocol (10 mg -> 5 mg -> 2.5 mg -> stop)
schedule: Nightly at bedtime to prevent nocturnal attacks
As cofactor within D3 Anti-Inflammatory Regimen
Higher doses during active cycle, lower during remission
Part of Antihistamine Full Monty (alongside Turmeric, Quercetin, Resveratrol, Omega-3, Selenium, Vitamin C)
Taken year-round as preventive (not just during cycles)

sideEffects: Improved sleep quality / easier to fall asleep
No effect / did not help with CH attacks
Reduced nocturnal attack frequency but did not eliminate attacks
Concern about interaction with psilocybin/LSD busting (melatonin modulates 5-HT2A receptors)
coTreatments: Energy drinks / caffeine (Red Bull, Monster, coffee)
